title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 7.220 - Duties
text:
7.220.  Duties. — The Missouri boundary commission shall represent the state of Missouri and may enter into negotiations with representatives from any state having common borders with the state of Missouri for the purpose of negotiating compacts with each of these states for the establishment of official boundaries between Missouri and each of these states.
(L. 1992 S.B. 571 § 3) 
Effective 7-09-92
